description: Eval cases for infrastructure security: Docker, IaC, CI/CD, serverless, multi-tenant isolation

cases.name: Running container as root
cases.code_snippet:
FROM ubuntu:22.04
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y python3 python3-pip
COPY app.py /app.py
CMD ["python3", "/app.py"]

cases.name: Hardcoded secrets in Terraform
cases.description: Database password hardcoded in IaC configuration
cases.code_snippet:
resource "aws_db_instance" "main" {
  identifier     = "mydb"
  engine         = "postgres"
  instance_class = "db.t3.micro"
  username       = "admin"
  password       = "P@ssw0rd123!SuperSecret"
  allocated_storage = 20
}

cases.name: Secrets exposed in CI/CD logs
cases.description: Sensitive data printed during CI/CD pipeline execution
cases.code_snippet:
name: Deploy
on: [push]
jobs:
  deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v3
      - name: Deploy
        env:
          API_KEY: ${{ secrets.API_KEY }}
        run: |
          echo "Deploying with API_KEY: $API_KEY"
          curl -H "Authorization: Bearer $API_KEY" https://api.example.com/deploy

cases.name: Lambda function overprivileged IAM role
Missing tenant isolation in database
Properly secured Docker image
cases.description: Container running as non-root with security options
cases.code_snippet:
FROM ubuntu:22.04 as builder
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y python3 python3-pip
COPY requirements.txt .
RUN pip install -r requirements.txt

FROM ubuntu:22.04
RUN useradd -m -u 1000 appuser
COPY --from=builder /usr/local/lib /usr/local/lib
COPY app.py /app/app.py
WORKDIR /app
USER appuser
CMD ["python3", "app.py"]
